text:
adidas Originals’ın Ankara’daki İlk Mağazası ANKAmall’da Açıldı

Moda tarihine damga vuran ikonik adidas siluetlerini günümüz stil kodlarıyla yeniden yorumlayan ve yaşam tarzı trendlerine yön veren adidas Originals, Türkiye’deki ikinci, Ankara’daki ilk mağazasını 7 Şubat Cumartesi günü ANKAmall Alışveriş Merkezi’nde açtı.

adidas Türkiye’nin Ankara’daki ilk adidas Originals konseptli mağazası, AVM’nin ikinci katında yer alıyor. Marketspor iş birliğiyle hayata geçirilen mağaza, 140 m² net satış alanına sahip. Markanın yeni nesil perakende yaklaşımını yansıtan modern ve yalın mimarisiyle dikkat çeken mağaza, adidas Originals dünyasını başkentle buluşturuyor.

adidas Originals Ankara ANKAmall, Originals ve lifestyle ürünlerin en yeni koleksiyonları moda ve spor tutkunlarıyla buluşturmanın ötesinde; stil, kültür ve ilhamın kesiştiği bir yaşam alanı olarak konumlanıyor. Mağaza, haftanın her günü 10.00–22.00 saatleri arasında ziyaret edilebiliyor.

Açılışla ilgili değerlendirmede bulunan adidas Türkiye CEO’su Hakan Atalay, şunları söyledi: “adidas Originals, adidas arşivlerinden gelen güçlü mirası, bugünün gençlik kültürü ve yaratıcılığıyla buluşturan çok özel bir marka. İstanbul Teşvikiye’de açtığımız ilk konsept mağazamızın ardından, Türkiye’deki ikinci, Ankara’daki ilk konsept mağazamız olan adidas Originals Ankara ANKAmall ile başkentlilere stil ve kültür odağında ilham veren ayrıcalıklı bir deneyim sunmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.”

#patronlargündemi #adidas #adidasoriginals #ankara #ankamall #perakende #moda #lifestyles #i̇şdünyası

Hi 👋 welcome to our ✨brand new✨ page! 

I’m Katie, and together with my 6-year-old daughter Hayden, I am so excited to announce OUR kid-friendly travel + lifestyle blog! 👯‍♀️

This project stems from Hayden’s big desire to share where she goes, what she loves, and to make people happy through spreading positivity ☀️ You can find her dancing, singing, taking a theater class, reading, and traveling around the world 🌎 🩰

As for me, I’m a mom who does marketing by trade and love nothing more than helping my girl achieve her dreams! It’s my goal to put her perspectives into useful and inspiring content for other mamas to use and cheer Hayden on as she shows her confidence and sunshine-y personality through her content 🫶🏼

We’re putting the finishing touches on our website, but please follow us along! 

Our family of four travels the world and I’ll be posting itineraries, tips, and kid-friendly finds as we wander around ✈️

text:
How is 2026 NEXT WEEK? 🍾🥂⏳

While I am sick to know how fast time is going, all it’s doing is making me want to be the best version of myself. 

And that starts by revamping my routines & finding the cracks. If you’re looking for a way to reset before the New Year and set yourself up for a successful year, I shared my non-negotiable for starting off on a good foot👀. 

The TLDR;
— do a year in review (aka a life audit). Where did you thrive and where did you fall off?
— host a little mood board / vision board get together with your friends or family. 
— Purge your closet and donate or sell anything you’re not wearing.
— Make a no-spend list. Figure out what you spent the most on last year and if it wasn’t a necessity, make a point to either buy less or none of it at all. 

Let’s make this year one of the best ones yet 🩰. What are you looking forward to in 2026?

#endofyearreflection #newyearresolutions #lifestyleblog #lifestylechange #lifeorganization
label: Lifestyle Daily

Wahine Stories is a travel, surf and lifestyle blog - you call it - written by a female surfer.

Hope you enjoy it here!😊

text: Hello!!! I have a question for you.  What color are your dreams?? Have they become grayed, muted and dull? Or are they alive and vibrantly colored and being put into action in your life ? Most of you know me as Lulu Schwall, the artist, but I have so many more facets to me like we all do.  I have recently experienced a “reawakening” if you will of dreams/interests I have left by the roadside.  I am excited to pick these back up and explore them again ...namely, fashion, beauty, photography/styling, cooking, relationships and of course art!!! I so love all of these areas and I am thankful that I don’t have to do just one!!! Life is too short to set limits on your creativity or passions!! I also found out there is a name for incorporating all of these areas into one space ...a “Lifestyle Blog”. I’m excited to share my take on all of these areas with you and have a lot of fun doing it.  I’m not at my ideal weight, or ideal place in my life ... my life is not perfect and I don’t wish to show perfection in this blog...I’m committed to showing up in my life and I’m going to celebrate me where I am today ....this blog serves as an avenue for me to do just that!! It’s so silly to wait until we are ready... we will never be truly ready.  I’m diving in with both feet. Dream On! 🌈💫⭐️ #lifestylebloggers #lifestyleblog #dreamon #pickupyourdreams #liveyourpassions #jumpinwithbothfeet #perfectionisoverrated

text:
#Repost @girl_rollin_about_town
• • • • • •
The Langham, London

The idea of creating a lifestyle blog came to me a few years ago. However, instead of immediately getting the creative juices flowing, I waited. Why? Mostly not knowing where to start, the fear of failing and overthinking the process too much! I’m also somewhat of a crazy perfectionist. I decided to start small with a travel blog on Wordpress as I wanted to be able to execute this lifestyle blog to the best of my ability. I am still in the process of fully visualising the idea using Insta as a platform with the intention to launch a website.

My goal is to use the blog as a platform to connect with fellow wheelchair users from around the world and showcase REALNESS!

WHY? Because I don’t feel wheelchair users are showcased or celebrated enough. I also want to address real issues that those with limited mobility may face. I often get told ‘𝑦𝑜𝑢’𝑟𝑒 𝑖𝑛 𝑎 𝑤ℎ𝑒𝑒𝑙𝑐ℎ𝑎𝑖𝑟 𝑦𝑒𝑡 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑙𝑜𝑜𝑘 𝑠𝑜 𝑔𝑜𝑜𝑑’ as if trying to say that being in a wheelchair and in good shape or fashionable don’t go hand in hand.

Overall, I’m an entrepreneur in the making who loves the idea of getting creative with blogging, fashion and fitness! Oh, and I very much enjoy gin, champagne, reading & eating. See you all soon on the blog :-) 📸: @sam_walia1611

text: Not many of you know, but I started a blog back in late April called Rhythms and Rest. It is a lifestyle blog about the rhythms of every day life, how to create better habits, and how to live life in a way that shines the glory of God in everything that we do. Through my own experiences and tendencies to keep my life as organized as possible, my goal with this blog is to use the habits and routines that I have created for myself to explain how I go about my days. Topics in this blog might include daily routines, creative outlet ideas, book recommendations, monthly recaps, life updates, how to stay focused, organization, the ups and downs of life, and lessons that I learn from just living the life that God has set out and provided for me. So if you’re interested, go check out my most recent post at www.rhythmsandrest.com! It’s a recap of this past month and all of the life changes I have gone through since August First. I learned so much in August, and I want to share it with you! Here’s to the beginning of a new project and a fun creative outlet! text:
What is a Lifestyle about?

A lifestyle blog/social media can focus on your life, beauty tips, recipes, or travel. It is about things how you live and see the world. It can be very personal, or you can write about topics that interest you. Here are a few ideas you can start your lifestyle blog/social media:

1. My favorite recipe
2 . My morning routine
3. My evening routine
4. How to sleep better
5. Share the things that inspire you every day
6. Book Review
7. Photo of the day, selfie or other
8. What hair products do I use and why
9. What skin care products do I use and why
10. 5 favorite tourist destinations
11. How to make more time for family
12. 5-minute makeup routine
13. 10-minute makeup routine
14. How to eat healthy
15. Favorite clothing stores
16. Your style (you can publish several publications on the topic)
17. How do I maintain my fitness
18. Contests. These are always popular.
19. Tell us your 2-year plan
20. Relationship advice
21. Favorite smoothie recipe
22. How to save money every month
23. Being single
24. Our family life with children
25. Everyday life of a single parent

There are many other topics you can write about and what I've seen lifestyle bloggers write about. Hopefully, these are useful. 
Please share your lifestyle blog in the comments!

Follow my life at @teijas75

#lifestyle #life #lifestylepostideas #lifestyleblog #lifestylebloggers #socialmedia #socialmediapostideas

🚀 Exciting News! Wu Wei Organization is LIVE! 🎉

I am beyond thrilled to announce the official launch of Wu Wei Organization LLC— my passion project brought to life! Our website is now up and running, ready to serve you with personalized, thoughtful solutions to create balance and simplicity in your space and life.

Wu Wei, inspired by the Dao philosophy, is all about effortless action—letting go of excess and finding harmony with what truly matters. Whether you’re seeking a more organized home, practical storage solutions, or just need a fresh perspective, we’re here to help you reclaim your space, one step at a time.

✨ What We Offer:

	•	Decluttering Services: Clear out what’s holding you back to make room for what inspires you.
	•	Home Organization: Transform chaos into calm with tailored organizing strategies for any room.
	•	Storage Solutions: Customized ideas to maximize space without sacrificing style.

But that’s not all! In addition to our hands-on services, I’m excited to share that Wu Wei Organization is also a Lifestyle Blog. Here, you’ll find content that speaks to the heart of intentional living, from simple organizing tips to inspirational stories and practical advice on living more mindfully. 📝✨

I’ve poured so much of my heart into this project, and I’m excited to share it with you. Whether you’re looking for services, or just a bit of daily inspiration, Wu Wei is here to support you on your journey to a more balanced and harmonious life.

Check us out at www.wuweiorganization.com and follow us on Instagram + Pinterest for tips, ideas, and updates as we grow!

Thank you all for your incredible support. I can’t wait to help you create space for what really matters. 🌿💛

text:
I have decided to start a lifestyle blog and a Facebook group. 

Being a mom who faces Mental Health as well as having a son with Mental Health issues.. 

I would love to...

1.) Write about my struggles and joys... writing my thoughts and feelings helps me with stress but I also know that there are many women out there also struggle with this... 

2.) I would like to start a Facebook group for Mom’s who struggle with Mental Health and or have kids that struggle with it.

After having to put my son into a in-patient facility this has been weighing on my heart and mind. I felt alone with no one to talk to and I want to create a safe space for women to be able to talk about their struggles, get the support they need from other women. 

I am struggling a little about names for my group.... I’ve had 2 suggestions so far.... Mental Haven and Silent Noise. 

What suggestions do you all have?

text:
My new blog, The scribbling homemaker (link in bio) is a lifestyle blog for stay at home spouses who are also creative. As someone who has chosen a childless lifestyle, struggles with chronic illness and autism, and is a spiritual pagan, the blog will focus on tips and tricks for making the most out of your journey as a stay at home spouse. There will be a spiritual element, and a focus on trying to stay healthy and productive. I am also a writer, I have two published novels in the fantasy genre and I am working on the third in a series, as well as an alternative history story. 

Right now, I’m the only contributor, but I’d like to fish around for other writers who might be interested in contributing. Anyone who might have a unique perspective on being a stay at home spouse, or a writer, or both. I enjoy working with other writers, it makes it a lot of fun. 

But feel free to check it out and sign up for the mailing list.

text:
Hi there,

My name is Fanny and I am the creator of Phenomenal; a lifestyle blog for people in their 20s & 30s. 

* 

Welcome to my unique lifestyle blog that touches on Faith, Creativity, My Thoughts, Finance/Investments & Intellectual Growth. I created this blog in 2014 but was not consistent with it, did not like the appearance of it and had too much I was juggling to dedicate the needed time to it. 

* 

Fast forward to today and a lot of editing and writing and rebranding, I’m finally confident enough to share this blog with the world. 

* 

I named my blog Phenomenal because we are all one of a kind. The goal is to share insights on things I have learnt throughout my life thus far while touching on my creative side. I hope my experiences will be both beneficial and inspirational.

Thinking about creating a lifestyle blog?⁣
⁣
A lifestyle blog is a website that focuses on personal style which can include beauty tips, travel adventures, recipes, and crafting. It covers a wide array of topics that usually correspond with the person who is the blogger and is not just about one solid niche. ⁣
⁣
A lot of lifestyle blogs grow because people connect with that person as an individual and they begin to trust them, which is really important in blogging. Here are 4 tips to help you start a lifestyle blog!⁣

Pick one of each, switch them up each day if you want, and see if you notice a more positive change throughout your week. 

The hardest part of a morning routine, I find, is that feeling like you need to include a 100 things in it. When in reality, it should only be a few. Realizing that you can switch it up and try new ones each day really relieves the stress of planning.

A morning routine shouldn’t feel like a to-do list, but more like a ritual.

text:
#關於Morning_Routine﻿
#早晨計畫表﻿
﻿
帥寶最近起床都會發懶⋯⋯﻿
一早起床邊聽DWE wake-up songs，﻿
一邊躺在床上悠哉享受，整個忘記接下來要做什麼事情！﻿
﻿
爸媽喊破喉嚨，男寶一樣耳背😂﻿
不然就是說：「再一分鐘好不好？」﻿
雖然通常帥寶都能說到做到，但每天這樣拖拉也是困擾😌﻿
﻿
再來孩子也大了要漸漸學會自己做，而不是爸媽都做好好。﻿
爸媽做好其實是最節省時間的，不用等待孩子、省去孩子犯錯還要再做一次麻煩，因為怕麻煩想省事，會不會也讓孩子錯過學習長大的機會？﻿
﻿
要解決這樣的情況～和隊友討論了一下，與其這樣一直嘮叨不停耳提面命提醒，孩子煩大人心情也不好！﻿
會不會也讓孩子養成叫一句才會動作的習慣，這樣也不好。﻿
﻿
既然 #自動自發 是我們想要的結果那就想一點辦法吧！﻿
就想到可以用 #早晨計畫表 #Morning_Routine 來提醒帥寶每天起床到出門上學前，要做的所有事情！﻿
﻿
其實就是把我們平時熟悉的工作排程表模式教會給孩子。﻿
﻿
和帥寶一起制定的 #Morning_Routine 就貼在冰箱上，我用簡單的插圖讓帥寶一看就懂代表什麼任務：﻿
✔️起床﻿
✔️喝一杯溫水﻿
✔️摺棉被﻿
✔️刷牙﻿
✔️幫花仙子澆水（後面補充花仙子故事）﻿
✔️換衣服﻿
✔️整理書包﻿
✔️吃早餐﻿
﻿
也在每個任務的格子裡放上數字，數字代表者順序，帥寶的年紀已經知道數字順序了，運用在這也讓他更清楚步驟是什麼。﻿
每完成一個任務就在上面蓋印章，帥寶很愛蓋印章，讓他覺得有趣，完成任務給自己一個印章，也讓孩子有成就感😃﻿
﻿
形式可以很活潑，很可愛，孩子就會很樂意參與進去，看看每天早晨到底要做什麼？什麼時候做？﻿
久而久之，就會養成自己的「早晨習慣」，最終讓「習慣」成「自然」了。﻿
﻿
有研究人員發現，每個人養成一個習慣平均要花66天的時間，也就是從一個陌生的動作到能成為自然反應或是反射動作的時間。﻿
﻿
05/12執行到今天第三天，帥寶有小小進步，已經很清楚知道等等的流程，完成每項任務後離出門上學，都還有更多寬裕的時間可以做他自己想做的事。﻿
上學不用匆匆忙忙，心情也比較好、情緒也會比較穩定！﻿
﻿
加油加油💪繼續保持下去﻿
﻿
之後習慣養成了，即使不用這樣的表，也可以慢慢學會安排、管理好早上的時間，精神飽滿、開開心心地開始一天的學習和玩樂了。﻿
﻿
男寶就是每天在鬥志，越有主見想法的孩子，盡量避免硬碰硬的方式，用些方法孩子也能做得很好👍﻿
﻿
男寶媽真的不容易😂﻿
﻿
#倆寶日常 #帥寶3Y10M7D﻿
#Morning_Routine ﻿
#LittleRegan帥寶寶即時播報﻿
﻿
⭐️如何製作Morning Routine﻿
1.用word編輯，格式隨個人喜好。﻿
2.設計好列印A4大小，然後記得護貝。﻿
3.準備孩子喜歡的印章或是磁鐵，完成的任務就在格子裡蓋章或貼上磁鐵，淘寶有賣打勾勾磁鐵，也可以參考唷！﻿
﻿
4.也可加上星期幾的欄位，還有是上學日還是放假日，這都可以變換的唷！﻿
﻿
PS:我用列點式計畫表，護貝後可以每天重複利用同一張Morning Routine就可以了，不用打勾完就丟一張紙，地球也是需要我們好好愛護的！♥️﻿
﻿
💐關於花仙子：﻿
之前還沒有Morning Routine時，跟隊友想解決早上帥寶不知道接下來自己要做什麼的狀況，看到一篇文章有講到可以讓孩子有任務，必須他每天去完成✅﻿
就發想～對也！浴室剛好有一盆植物，就讓帥寶每天幫它澆水！﻿
﻿
這盆植物我們取名它叫花仙子，前一晚鍾爸爸在親子共讀的時間，用講故事聊天的方式讓帥寶得知這個任務，故事內容大概是花仙子想長大所以要喝水，他好想帥寶幫他澆水，他才能像你長的一樣高！（爸爸的故事有起承轉合太長了，就不打上來了😂）﻿
﻿
有時不小心發懶，提醒他說花仙子一整晚沒喝水嘴巴好渴他在等你了！通常都會立馬去做！﻿
﻿
這樣有個明確目標讓他除了有責任心外，也能用有趣的方式讓他有動力。♥️

انتظار داشتن

خیلی از دیگران انتظار داشتن من رو اولویت بگذارن ولی خودم اولویت آخر خودم بودم، انرژیم پایین بود و ذهنم حرف های منفی می زد و همش توی ترس زندگی می کردم و طول کشید تا یاد گرفتم که برای حال خوب داشتن، تصمیم درست گرفتن، انرژی داشتن باید به خودم بها بدم و برای خودم وقت بگذارم. 
وقتی برای خودمون وقت می گذاریم هم آروم تر هستیم، هم از تله منفی نگری ذهن آگاه هستیم و هم با دل خوش به دستاوردهامون می رسیم.

label: Lifestyle Daily

text:
🚨 Alisha Lehmann shared her morning routine in interviews:

"I wake up at around 8:45 am on training days."

"On days off, I can stay in bed until 1 pm or later. I’m probably the person who sleeps the most — I need my hours and I take a nap every single day."

"I usually wake up with a smile, though I might be a bit groggy the first hour. When I arrive at training, I try to make everyone laugh and bring positive energy to the group."

"No fancy skincare or ice-on-face ritual for me. As a pro footballer, I focus on hydration and fueling my body right."

"For breakfast, it’s often my biggest meal of the day — something simple like rice with meat and beans, pasta with tomato sauce, or a cheeky Swiss classic like Toblerone. I love a creamy spaghetti carbonara as a cheat meal."

"In the morning I love to move: on training days it’s team sessions with strength work (squats, lunges, deadlifts, core), agility, running, and ball skills like keepy-uppies."

"On off days or vacation I do fun stuff like keepy-uppies on the beach, shuttle runs in the sand, or a refreshing dip in the sea (like in Dubai)."

"Starting the day with hard work, gratitude, and good humor keeps me motivated. People don’t always see the effort behind it."

text:
You spend 3 hours on shopify on the same 7 tasks.

I automated all of them with Claude. 👇

Every D2C operator I know has the same morning routine:
→ Open Shopify, check yesterday's revenue
→ Open Ads Manager, check which ads are dying
→ Open Gorgias, triage overnight tickets
→ Check reviews
→ Check stock levels
→ Check competitors
→ Try to actually start the day by 11 AM

3 hours. Every morning. Before any real work happens.

Claude scheduled tasks kill this routine.

Here are the 7 I automated:

1/ Revenue + margin snapshot — daily, 7 AM
Pulls yesterday's orders, AOV, refund rate, net revenue.
Compares to 7-day average. Flags anything off by 20%+.
I know the health of the business before I open Shopify.

2/ Out-of-stock × active ads alert — every 4 hours
Cross-references OOS SKUs with running Meta ad sets.
If an ad is driving traffic to a sold-out product, it flags immediately.
This one task has saved me $1,400+ in wasted spend.

3/ Creative fatigue scan — daily, 8 AM
Tags every active ad: healthy, warning, or critical.
CTR decay, frequency creep, hook rate drops.
I know what to pause before I open Ads Manager.

4/ Review + ticket pattern detector — daily, 8 AM
Scans overnight reviews + Gorgias tickets.
Flags when 3+ customers complain about the same issue.
Catches product problems 2 weeks earlier than manual review.

5/ Competitor ad + content watch — daily, 7 AM
Top 3 competitors' new Meta ads + new TikToks/Reels.
New hooks, formats, angles, sounds.
I see their moves before they scale.

6/ PDP conversion drop alert — daily, 9 AM
Finds products with yesterday's traffic but a conversion rate
20%+ below the site average.
That's a PDP problem, not a traffic problem.
Fixable today instead of next month.

7/ Customer feedback → new ad angles — weekly, Monday
Takes the week's reviews + ticket themes + DM questions.
Generates 5 new ad angles based on actual customer language.
My best ads always come from customer words. Now it's automated.

What this replaces:
Before: 3 hours every morning reading 7 dashboards.
After: 15 minutes reviewing one consolidated brief from Claude.
The rest of the morning is actually mine again.

Comment "Morning" and I'll send you:
→ The 7 scheduled task prompts (copy-paste ready)
→ A setup guide for connecting Shopify + Meta
→ A morning briefing template
(must be connected)

text:
The Tolerance Sequence

Four things. Done before you touch your phone. Before coffee. Before words from anyone else.

This is not a morning routine. I do not care about cold showers or gratitude lists. This is a narrow intervention that targets the morning window before it closes.

First, lie completely still for about a minute. Then say one identity claim out loud. One sentence. Who you are becoming, stated as fact.

Not “I want to be someone who executes consistently.” That is a wish.

“I am someone who executes consistently.” That is a statement.

Right after, write one sentence. The exact objection your brain threw at the claim.

“You said you’re consistent but you skipped three days last week.”

“You’re not there yet. Why are you lying to yourself.”

Write it on whatever is closest. Notebook. Scrap of paper. Nightstand.

Then do one tiny physical action. Under two minutes. Something that matches the claim.

If your claim is “I am someone who executes consistently,” open the laptop and type one sentence. Close it. Walk away.

Finally, wait. Ten more minutes before you check anything. No notifications. No revenue dashboard.

That extra delay lets the claim settle a little longer before the outside world starts arguing with it.

text:
Anytime I see “day in the life” videos and they include the fake waking up clip, stretching, yawning, getting out of bed like they just woke up… it loses me. Come on now. The video could’ve easily started after that. I’d even get it if it started at brushing your teeth. But filming yourself “waking up” when you’ve been up for at least 30 minutes to an hour???

Mind you, I’ve been a content creator since 2011 and it never once crossed my mind to fake film myself waking up for a video. I know content creation is already somewhat performative, but there has to be a line somewhere.
